## Description (required)

Fixes #INSERT_ISSUE_NUMBER_HERE

Briefly describe the changes introduced in this pull request.

Explain:
- What feature/bug this PR addresses
- What changes were implemented
- Why these changes were necessary

Example:
Implemented the Join Event screen that allows participants to join an event by scanning a QR code or entering the 6-digit event code manually. This improves the event onboarding flow for participants.
